steps.title: Identify the rightmost non-empty bin
steps.content: Each bar represents a $50$-foot interval (lengths $< 50$, $50$ to $99$, $100$ to $149$, $150$ to $199$, $200$ to $249$, etc.). The maximum length must fall inside the rightmost non-empty bin in the histogram.

steps.title: Match the choice to that bin
steps.content:
From the histogram, the rightmost non-empty bar is the bin $200 \le \text{length} < 250$.

Any value in that range — including $219$ — is a possible maximum.

Choices $69$, $119$, and $169$ would all fall in earlier bins and so cannot be the maximum.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
